content:
This isn't really a guide per se, but I did do a full commentary of a 72000 Deep Dive run with Caro Ultra Uvhash you can skim here:
https://youtu.be/JRJ7ey0BxQg

embeds.title: [Morimens] 1 hour of Uvhash 72k Deep Dive to fall asleep to
embeds.description: By popular request (of about 3 whole people!) here is a full deep dive run with commentary, I went a bit slower than usual as things weren't perfect and I wanted to explain some of my decisions, but hopefully this helps you play Uvhash and/or pass out into the deepest yet most relaxing sleep of all

thread_title: An Uvhash Guide to Dealing Death and (perhaps) not Receiving It in Kind

embeds.title: Morimens. Flares' Awakener Review : Salvador - A Tier Caro Tank/DPS...
